race.comment: PARK KEY PAW (8) boxed on well to finish second last time, beaten 0.8 lengths (17.78) behind Rockin' Panama at this track. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minor placings. Capable of going well again. ABLE RIVAL (3) has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing sixth (18.02) in a Grade 4 at this track. Good beginner aided by a nice draw. Has ability and can measure up. WONDER KID (6) has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing fifth (17.75) in a Grade 5 at this track. Form from his last run is proving to be solid. Has ability and can measure up. TRALEE TINY (4) was out of the money here last time out but can bounce back.

runners.name: Hot Work
runners.owners: Ball Ball Synd T Ball,G Ball
